buildCommand: cd ../.. && npm run build -w @sol-tictactoe/shared && npm run build -w @sol-tictactoe/web

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://accounts.google.com https://apis.google.com https://va.vercel-scripts.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https: wss: blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:; child-src 'self' blob:; frame-src https://accounts.google.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
